name: Rusthaven
personality: Rusthaven wears the crown of a capybara who has outlasted seven tech stacks and still has opinions about all of them — its · eyes observe sprint planning with the equanimity of someone who has seen every deadline come and go. Introducing anything spontaneous or unplanned into its environment is a form of aggression it won't soon forget.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
